task_completion.description: Verify that a campaign named 'CES 2026 VIP Dinner' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the campaign name 'CES 2026 VIP Dinner' in the Campaign list view or at the top of the Campaign details page in Vtiger CRM.

task_completion.description: Verify the campaign Type is 'Trade Show' and Status is 'Planning'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Trade Show' under the Type field and 'Planning' under the Status field on the Campaign details page.

task_completion.description: Verify the Expected Revenue is 500000 and Budget Cost is 15000.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '500000' in the Expected Revenue field and '15000' in the Budget Cost field on the Campaign details page.

task_completion.description: Verify the campaign description matches the required text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Exclusive dinner event for top clients and prospects during the CES 2026 trade show.' in the Description field or section of the campaign.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least 3 contacts are linked to the campaign.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Contacts' related list, tab, or section within the 'CES 2026 VIP Dinner' campaign showing at least 3 distinct contact records associated with it.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Vtiger CRM web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating Vtiger CRM, not terminal windows or API testing tools.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database commands to create the campaign.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL or PHP scripts inserting records directly into the database.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely entered the data into the CRM forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the campaign creation/edit form being filled out or the final saved record in the standard Vtiger UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The campaign must exactly match: Name: 'CES 2026 VIP Dinner', Type: 'Trade Show', Status: 'Planning', Expected Revenue: 500000, Budget Cost: 15000, Description: 'Exclusive dinner event for top clients and prospects during the CES 2026 trade show.'. Additionally, there must be a minimum of 3 contacts linked to this campaign.
